The `inspect_project` tool returned a truncated file list (257 total) — the full docs subtree includes `.astro` pages under `./docs/src/pages/{en,zh,...}`, markdown content under `./docs/src/content/docs/{en,zh}/`, and bot-platform-specific pages for DingTalk, Discord, Feishu, Line, Slack, Telegram, WeCom, Weixin iLink. There are 27 `.md` files and 6 `.astro` files total across the repo, but some docs files may have been omitted from the truncated listing. No test files detected. Verification commands: `npm run typecheck` (medium confidence), `npm run build` (high confidence). Project root is `/Volumes/Data/Products/claude-code-router` (npm, TypeScript+React, Electron app). Package name `claude-code-router` v3.0.0 uses `electron-builder`, `better-sqlite3`, `react`, `tailwindcss`. Documentation subdirectory is `./docs/` (Astro-based, bilingual: en/zh). The `inspect_project` tool returned a truncated file list (257 total) — the full docs subtree includes `.astro` pages under `./docs/src/pages/{en,zh,...}`, markdown content under `./docs/src/content/docs/{en,zh}/`, and bot-platform-specific pages for DingTalk, Discord, Feishu, Line, Slack, Telegram, WeCom, Weixin iLink. There are 27 `.md` files and 6 `.astro` files total across the repo, but some docs files may have been omitted from the truncated listing. Key files visible: `./docs/astro.config.mjs`, `./docs/package.json`, `./docs/src/components/DocPage.astro`, `./docs/src/pages/index.astro`, layout at `./docs/src/layouts/DocsLayout.astro`, i18n at `./docs/src/i18n/content.ts`, bot platform list at `./docs/src/bot-platforms.ts`. No test files detected. Verification commands: `npm run typecheck` (medium confidence), `npm run build` (high confidence). The task is to fix multiple issues in the documentation content, structure, and tone — making it product-grade and shifting to a real-user voice in Chinese.
